instruction: Which of the following changes the analysis of variance results? [ANS] A. the order of the samples is changed  B. the same constant is added to every one of the sample values  C. the same constant is added to each value in one of the samples  D. each value in one of the samples is multiplied by the same constant  E. each of the sample values is multiplied by the same constant  F. each of the sample values is converted to a different scale
